batch_summary.batch_narrative: In this batch of 1000 flows, the ML pre-filter auto-confirmed 950 as benign and sent 50 to the 6-agent LLM pipeline. The agents identified 41 true attacks with 0 false positives and missed 9 attacks (recall=82%, F1=90%). Total cost: $1.57.
